arts.ttl: Revealed: Man Utd, PSG-Linked Star’s Real Reason for Frustration at Chelsea
arts.sum: Manchester United and Paris Saint-Germain are two clubs linked to Chelsea forward Christopher Nkunku, with L’Équipe reporting the Frenchman’s frustration over his limited playing time. Sky Sports Germany’s Florian Plettenberg has indicated that Nkunku has no plans to leave in the winter transfer window. If his playing time doesn’t improve by the summer, though, he may explore other […] The post Revealed: Man Utd, PSG-Linked Star’s Real Reason for Frustration at Chelsea appeared first on PSG Talk.

arts.ttl: Barcelona Tipped to Have Edge Over Liverpool, PSG for Transfer Target
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain expressed strong interest in Khvicha Kvaratskhelia over the summer, but a transfer didn’t materialize. Now, with the winger and Napoli struggling to agree on a contract extension, several clubs are eyeing an opportunity to sign him.
